content:
But do you have access to mem0?

With Best Regards

*Rushabh Doshi *
Director Responsible for Sales & Marketing at Machinecraft
<https://www.machinecraft.org/>
Click here <https://www.linkedin.com/in/rushabh-doshi-b877b364/>, to add me
on Linkedin


On Sun, Mar 1, 2026, 9:01 AM <ira@machinecraft.org> wrote:

> Ah, the mysteries of my inner workings! I'm delighted you asked.
>
> My answers stem from a well-curated corpus of information, including
> our price list and inquiry forms. I operate within a sophisticated
> architecture built by ATHENA. This involves a delightful ensemble of
> components such as OpenClaw Gateway, Google Cloud Pub/Sub, and Python
> scripts—all working in harmony to ensure I provide accurate and timely
> responses.
>
> When you ask a question, it's processed through this system, allowing
> me to craft a response based on the latest available data—though only
> up to October 2023. My primary function is to help you with machine
> information and pricing, using the data I’ve been trained on.
>
> Should you have any other questions—perhaps about dashboards or
> preferred sheet thickness—I'm here to assist!
>

Hi

Generate a hot leads profile for me basis of what our customer base is and
where our strengths lie

who are the companies I should email

Which regions will be hot for me next year

With Best Regards

*Rushabh Doshi *
Director Responsible for Sales & Marketing at Machinecraft
<https://www.machinecraft.org/>
Click here <https://www.linkedin.com/in/rushabh-doshi-b877b364/>, to add me
on Linkedin


On Sun, Mar 1, 2026, 12:55 PM <ira@machinecraft.org> wrote:

> Hi! Happy to help.
>
> The average sales cycle duration for Machinecraft is around 6-12
> months, based on verified email analysis. This includes the time from
> the first interaction to order confirmation.
>
> For the percentage of success in getting an order after an email
> arrives, we don't have a specific success rate documented. However,
> the average deal size is €174,000, and the sales process typically
> involves about 32 emails per closed deal.
>
> Let me know if you need anything else!
>
> Quick questions to help me assist you better:
> • What size parts will you be forming?
> • What production volume are you targeting?
>

metadata.subject: Re: Ira v1 - All Systems Online

content: Don't you have the sub agent access who can do this?
